scripts.migration:generate: cross-env TYPEORM_CLI=true ts-node -P tsconfig.typeorm.json -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:generate -d src/lib/database.ts
scripts.migration:run: cross-env TYPEORM_CLI=true ts-node -P tsconfig.typeorm.json -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d src/lib/database.ts
scripts.migration:revert: cross-env TYPEORM_CLI=true ts-node -P tsconfig.typeorm.json -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:revert -d src/lib/database.ts
scripts.migration:create: cross-env TYPEORM_CLI=true ts-node -P tsconfig.typeorm.json -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:create
